title: convolvulus hystrix subsp. ruspolii
intro: Convolvulus hystrix subsp. ruspolii is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family, commonly known as a type of bindweed or morning glory. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Convolvulus hystrix subsp. ruspolii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, and it can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
